things.name: Cies Islands
things.description: National Park archipelago of three islands with crystal-clear turquoise waters, white sand beaches and abundant seabird colonies; boat trips from Vigo harbour

things.name: Vigo Old Town (Casco Vello)
things.description: Vibrant old quarter of narrow cobbled lanes with the Reconquista Church, the market and tapas bars specialising in fresh Galician shellfish and octopus

things.name: Vigo Harbour and Estuary
things.description: One of Europe's largest natural harbours backed by mountains; the working waterfront with fish auction, mussel rafts and ferries to the Cies Islands

things.name: Museo do Mar de Galicia
things.description: Modern maritime museum on the seafront with outstanding exhibits on Galician fishing tradition, ocean science and the underwater archaeology of Vigo bay

things.name: Monte del Castro Park
things.description: Hilltop park with an 18th-century castle offering the finest panoramic views over the ria, islands and surrounding mountains; the green heart of Vigo

things.name: Mercado da Pedra (Oyster Market)
things.description: Famous market where women shell oysters on the street and sell them with lemon; an authentic Galician tradition in the old town since the 17th century

things.name: Galician Contemporary Art Museum (MARCO)
things.description: Contemporary art museum in a stunning converted old prison with changing exhibitions of Galician and international modern art

things.name: Playa de Samil
things.description: Vigo's largest urban beach stretching along the ria promenade with views to the Cies Islands; popular for swimming, cycling and sunset walks

things.name: Pazo de Castrelos Park
things.description: Formal gardens and woodland surrounding an elegant 17th-century manor house housing the municipal museum of archaeology and fine arts

things.name: Abanca-Balaidos Stadium
things.description: Home of RC Celta de Vigo with 29,000 capacity; Celta reached the UEFA Europa League semi-finals in 2016-17 and are a regular La Liga top-half side
